description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 BENEFITS 2 EFFECTS How should Animal Greens be taken? Take 1 packet with any meal. It was developed for serious athletes and forms the basis for an active and healthy lifestyle. Are the ingredients tested and safe? All of our products are manufactured in our GMP-certified US facility and each batch is tested in a pharmaceutical facility for quality, safety and potency.
